description: Scaffold the React + Vite + Tailwind CSS project and implement the complete Bumble Automation Panel SPA with all 8 required sections: proxy input, account credentials (Facebook/Gmail), SMS API, image upload, name selector, bio section with rewrite, token output, and start/stop automation control. Dark purple/pink theme, card-based layout, mock automation logic.
steps: Initialize Vite React TypeScript project in /projects/sandbox/bumble using `npm create vite@latest . -- --template react-ts` (answer prompts non-interactively or use flags)
Install dependencies: tailwindcss@3, postcss, autoprefixer, lucide-react, react-hot-toast, framer-motion. Run `npm install`.
Initialize Tailwind: `npx tailwindcss init -p`. Configure tailwind.config.js with content paths and extend theme with custom purple/pink palette.
Set up index.css with Tailwind directives and global dark background styles.
Create src/types/index.ts with TypeScript interfaces: Proxy, Account (Facebook|Gmail), SmsConfig, ProfileImage, NameConfig, Bio, TokenResult, AutomationLog, AppState.
Create src/utils/nameGenerator.ts: generateRandomName() returns { first, last } from curated lists of first/last names (~50 each).

Create src/utils/bioRewriter.ts: rewriteBio(bio: string) => string - mock rewriter that shuffles sentences, replaces words with synonyms from a small map, adds/removes filler phrases to produce a variation.

Create src/utils/mockAutomation.ts: simulateAccountCreation(account, proxy, smsConfig, images, name, bio) returns a promise resolving after 1-3s with { token: string, accountId: string, userId: string, createdAt: string, status: 'success'|'failed', message: string }. Generate realistic-looking fake tokens (UUID-like hex strings) and account IDs.

Create src/hooks/useAutomation.ts: manages automation state - accounts queue, running/stopped state, progress, logs array, results array. Exposes start(), stop(), reset() functions. Processes accounts sequentially with delay, emitting log messages for each step (connecting proxy, verifying phone, creating account, uploading photos, setting bio, retrieving token).
Create src/components/Header.tsx: top navigation bar with Bumble-style logo/wordmark (bee emoji + 'BumbleMaker' text), subtitle 'Automation Panel v1.0', status indicator pill showing Online/Ready.

Create src/components/Sidebar.tsx: left navigation sidebar with icon+label links for each section (Proxies, Accounts, SMS API, Images, Names, Bios, Results, Run). Active section highlighting. Collapsible on mobile.

Create src/components/ProxyInput.tsx: card section titled 'Proxies'. Large textarea (placeholder: 'http://user:pass@host:port\nsocks5://host:port\n...'). Format hint panel showing supported formats. Proxy count badge. Test Proxies button (mocked - shows random pass/fail per proxy with a toast). Import from file button.

Create src/components/AccountCredentials.tsx: card section titled 'Accounts'. Toggle between Facebook and Gmail modes (pill tabs). For Facebook: two columns - email/username field + password field. For Gmail: email field + password field. Add Account button appends to list. Account list table with #, type icon, email, password (masked), delete button. Import accounts from file (plain text parsing). Account count badge.

Create src/components/SmsApiInput.tsx: card section titled 'SMS Verification'. Provider selector dropdown: SMSPool, SMS-Activate, VerifyWithSMS, TextVerified, Custom. Each provider shows its specific field label (API Key vs API URL). Input field for the key/URL. Country code selector (dropdown with top 10 countries). Test Connection button (mocked). Integration status badge.

Create src/components/ImageUpload.tsx: card section titled 'Profile Images'. Drag-and-drop zone (dashed border, upload icon, 'Drop images here or click to browse'). File input accepts image/*. Preview grid of uploaded images (thumbnail, filename, size, delete button). Image count badge. Reorder hint. Max images warning if > 6.

Create src/components/NameSelector.tsx: card section titled 'Name Generator'. Toggle radio: 'Auto Generate' vs 'Manual List'. Auto mode: shows preview of 3 random generated names with Refresh button. Manual mode: textarea for names (one per line, format: 'First Last'). Name count / preview badge.

Create src/components/BioSection.tsx: card section titled 'Profile Bios'. Textarea to add a new bio + Add Bio button. List of added bios - each bio shown in a card with: truncated preview, Edit button, Rewrite button (calls bioRewriter, shows spinner then replaces bio text with rewritten version, shows diff indicator), Delete button. Bulk Rewrite All button at top. Bio count badge.

Create src/components/TokenOutput.tsx: card section titled 'Results & Tokens'. Table/list of automation results: #, Account (email), Status badge (Success/Failed), Token (truncated + copy button), Account ID (copy button), User ID (copy button), Timestamp. Copy All button to copy entire results as JSON. Export CSV button. Empty state illustration when no results yet.

Create src/components/AutomationControl.tsx: full-width card at bottom. Left: stats row (Total Accounts, Completed, Failed, Success Rate %). Center: prominent Start button (green gradient, play icon) that becomes Stop button (red, stop icon) when running. Progress bar showing % complete. Right: configuration summary (proxy count, account count, etc.). Below: scrollable log output area (monospace font, dark bg, timestamped log lines with color coding: blue=info, yellow=warning, green=success, red=error). Log auto-scrolls to bottom.

Create src/App.tsx: main layout with Header at top, Sidebar on left (fixed), main scrollable content area on right with all section components rendered as a single-page with anchor IDs. Use React context or prop drilling to share useAutomation state. Add react-hot-toast Toaster. Smooth scroll to sections when sidebar links clicked.
Update src/main.tsx to render App with StrictMode.
Update index.html title to 'BumbleMaker - Automation Panel'.
Ensure `npm run build` completes without errors.
Create an initial commit on main branch with all files, then create and switch to branch feature/automation-panel.
acceptance_criteria: `npm run build` completes without errors and outputs dist/
`npm run dev` starts the dev server on port 5173
All 8 sections render: Proxies, Accounts, SMS API, Images, Names, Bios, Results, Automation Control
Dark purple/pink theme is applied throughout
Facebook/Gmail toggle in Accounts section works
Adding proxies (textarea) and seeing count badge works
Adding accounts and seeing them in the list works
Auto/Manual name toggle works, auto mode shows random names
Adding bios and clicking Rewrite produces a variation
Start button begins simulation, log lines appear, progress bar advances
After simulation, results appear in Token Output section
Copy buttons work for tokens/account IDs
verification: Confirm dist/ directory exists after build
findings: Build passes cleanly with tsc and vite. All dependencies installed without issues. Used crypto.randomUUID() for ID generation (available in modern browsers). npm create vite did not work in-place due to existing .agents folder, so project was scaffolded manually.
